raw_text: kirubakaran kumar = kirubakaran.kumarl3@gmail.com tt, +918610760081 @ thanjavur, tamil nadu, india ff) https://www.linkedin.com/in/kumar-kirubakaran pk indian profile experienced aircraft engineering graduate with a bachelor's degree in aircraft engineering technology (hons.) in mechanical, adept at translating theoretical knowledge into practical solutions. specializing in aircraft structures and maintenance, with a strong focus on ensuring the highest operational standards in line with airworthiness requirements. seeking a dynamic role in the aviation industry. professional experience graduate engineer trainee, asia aerotechnic sdn bhd 08/2022 - 01/2023 subang, malaysia worked in aircraft structures and maintenance, with a strong understanding of continued airworthiness management for airbus a320, boeing 737ng & classic, and atr 72 aircraft. assisted in structural damage assessment and repair, including composite parts. worked with managing technical publications such as ad, sb, ipc, tfu, amm, and cmm. worked in the maintenance planning department (camo) utilizing trax software, assisting in filing, updating, and maintaining technical records, overhaul reports, and maintenance reports. prepared, coordinated, and monitored work schedules to ensure timely completion of tasks. participated in troubleshooting, inspecting, testing, and repairing aircraft systems (engine, hydraulics systems). assisted in calibrating tools and managing the indent of tool supplies. education beng.tech aircraft engineering technology (hons.) in mechanical, 01/2019 - 02/2023 universiti kuala lumpur - malaysian institute of aviation technology sepang, malaysia secured cgpa of 3.71/4, graduated on nov 2023 skills microsoft office suites eeeo$0 catia & autocad (2d, 3d design) eeee adobe illustrator eee ccna & ccnp v3 ..0.0. languages english (added knowledge in simplified technical english) tamil native malaya1
